mailDowngraded.message: You downgraded to a plan that doesn't support Internxt Mail. Your account will be deleted in {{days}} days.

welcome.description: Encrypted email built for real privacy. Zero tracking. Full control.

appLoader.title: Preparing your mail
appLoader.subtitle: This may take a few seconds...

updateEmail.title: Set up Internxt email
description: Hey {{name}}, to use Mail, you’ll need to create your new Internxt email address.
This email will become your new login for all Internxt services.
Your previous email {{current_email}} will be saved for account recovery.

rules.edges: Start and end with a letter or number
rules.takenNoSuggestion: This mail is taken. Try a different username

confirmPassword.title: Confirm your password
confirmPassword.description: For security reasons, please confirm your password to activate your new login email.

confirmChanges.title: Your Internxt email is ready
confirmChanges.description: From now on, use your Internxt email to sign in to all Internxt services.

auth.genericError: Unable to log in. Please try again or contact support if the problem persists.
auth.popupBlocked: The popup window was blocked. Please allow popups for Internxt Meet.

identitySetup.passwordWrong: The password is incorrect. Please try again.
identitySetup.emailNotSelected: Please choose an email address first
identitySetup.availabilityCheckFailed: Something went wrong while checking the address availability. Please try again.
identitySetup.passwordCheckFailed: Something went wrong while verifying your password
identitySetup.setupFailed: Something went wrong while setting up your account

errors.downloadingDesktopApp: Something went wrong while downloading the app

mail.markAsRead: Something went wrong while marking the email as read
mail.markAsUnread: Something went wrong while marking the email as unread
mail.trash: Something went wrong while deleting the email
mail.move: Something went wrong while moving the email
mail.noRecipients: Add at least one recipient before sending
mail.forwardAttachmentFailed: Could not prepare an attachment for forwarding. Please try again.
mail.internxtKeyMissing: Could not find encryption keys for an Internxt recipient. Please try again later.
mail.encryptionUnavailable: Encryption isn't ready yet. Please try again in a moment.
mail.bccNotSupportedEncrypted: Bcc isn't available for encrypted emails yet. Move the recipient to To or Cc.
mail.draftSaveFailed: Could not save the draft. Your changes are still here.
mail.draftDiscardFailed: Could not delete the draft. Please try again.
mail.draftOpenFailed: Could not open the draft. Please try again.

default.title: Upgrade now
default.description: Your current plan doesn't allow you this feature. Upgrade now to unlock all the benefits of Internxt.

meet.title: Unlock Meet
meet.description: Upgrade now to host and join fully encrypted video calls — private, secure, and unlimited.

mail.title: Unlock Mail
mail.description: Unlock your private email service with end-to-end encryption.

vpn.title: Unlock VPN
vpn.description: Upgrade to protect your traffic with private, encrypted browsing.

antivirus.title: Unlock Antivirus
antivirus.description: Upgrade to scan, detect, and block malware in real time.

cleaner.title: Unlock Cleaner
cleaner.description: Upgrade now to keep your files optimized and free up space.

confirmDeletePermanently.descriptionOne: This email will be permanently deleted and cannot be recovered.
confirmDeletePermanently.descriptionMany: These {{count}} emails will be permanently deleted and cannot be recovered.

errors.noRecipients: Add at least one recipient before sending

support.title: Support
support.description: Navigate helpful articles or get assistance from our team.
